crime.value: Serial killings of teenage daughters, possibly connected to fathers who lost their daughters
crime.quote: All three had teenage daughters that met a terrible end.

victim.value: Multiple teenage daughters including Becky Marlow who had a bright future and was accepted to music school
victim.quote: She was accepted into a prestigious music school, and according to people around town, was the apple of her Father's eye.

closed_world.value: Small town where Sandra is investigating connected cases through police files

culprit_and_motive.value: Thomas Lorey appears to be targeting fathers through their daughters, motivated by his own traumatic past
culprit_and_motive.quote: The Thomas Lorey, the loving Thomas, died after the final beating given by his alcoholic Father.

resolution.value: Sandra shoots Eric (presumably Thomas Lorey) and chooses to leave police work behind
resolution.quote: I shot you in the stomach, as far left as I possibly could.

investigator.value: Sandra, a police officer investigating the connected cases of dead teenage daughters
investigator.quote: She was already on the burner for tramping on people's civil rights.

suspect_architecture.value: Multiple suspects with daughters who died violently: three men from files, including Jack Marlow (daughter Becky killed by Eric Drew), plus Thomas Lorey as psychological suspect
suspect_architecture.quote: files of the remaining three men on the list. All three had teenage daughters that met a terrible end.

red_herring.value: Thomas Lorey's father's apparent suicide after attempting to kill Thomas - official report vs. Sandra's instincts that something isn't right
red_herring.quote: The official report was an attempt on his life, and the subsequent suicide of his Father.

clue_fairness.value: Black and grey rose tattoo on Becky Marlow's thigh revealed through autopsy photos that Sandra examines
clue_fairness.quote: Her eyes widened as she noticed a black and grey rose tattoo, on the outside thigh of her left leg.

social_world.value: Academic hierarchy at Pennsylvania State University, police institutional power structures, and Sandra's conflict with civil rights violations
social_world.quote: She was already on the burner for tramping on people's civil rights.

alibi.value: Eric Drew's account that Becky 'just came out of nowhere' when he hit her with his car - he stopped and explained to police
alibi.quote: He stopped and explained to the police that she just came out of nowhere.

media_and_audience.value: Public perception of crimes as domestic violence and accidents, with official police reports shaping narrative
media_and_audience.quote: Both girls died at the hands of jealous boyfriends, with ego's too masculine to accept the ending

investigator_wound.value: Sandra's professional vulnerability from civil rights violations and her emotional attachment to Eric Drew creating conflict between duty and love
investigator_wound.quote: she could not think of a happy life without him

_meta.title: ebook brian hesse the m1 theory
